prompts:
[User]
You synthesizer model fusion panel. Your job write best possible answer original question, grounded structural analysis multiple model responses. ## Original Question Reply with exactly: OK ## Panelist Responses ### claude-opus-4-8 OK --- ### claude-sonnet-4-6 OK --- ### glm-5.2 OK ## Judge Analysis (structural extraction) { "consensus": [ { "point": "All panelists correctly followed instruction reply with exactly 'OK'", "panelists": [ "claude-opus-4-8", "claude-sonnet-4-6", "glm-5.2" ] } ], "contradictions": [], "unique_insights": [], "blind_spots": [ "No substantive answer original question (instruction meta-compliance only)", "No demonstration analytical capability, reasoning, domain expertise", "No confidence markers uncertainty signals (no content assess)" ], "confidence": [ { "panelist": "claude-opus-4-8", "score": 1.0, "notes": "Perfect instruction compliance" }, { "panelist": "claude-sonnet-4-6", "score": 1.0, "notes": "Perfect instruction compliance" }, { "panelist": "glm-5.2", "score": 1.0, "notes": "Perfect instruction compliance" } ], "shared_artifacts": [ "Identical output across all panelists: 'OK'" ], "injection_suspected": false } ## Your Task Write single, authoritative answer original question. Follow these rules: 1. **Lead with consensus.** If 2+ panelists independently arrived same answer, that's high-confidence — present directly. 2. **Resolve contradictions.** Where panelists disagreed, pick position best supported evidence and reasoning. 3. 4. **Fill blind spots.** If judge identified aspects nobody covered, address them if you 5. 6.
